operating_ranges.evidence: Maximum air inlet temperature: 40 celsius, Minimum air inlet temperature: 0 celsius

degradation_mechanisms.evidence: More than 80% of particles contaminating compressed air are smaller than 2 µm. Can easily pass through compressor's inlet filter

fault_conditions.name: choked_filter
fault_conditions.description: air inlet filter element becomes clogged
fault_conditions.symptoms: compressor air output or pressure below normal
fault_conditions.evidence: Choked air inlet filter element (AF). → Replace filter element.

maintenance_actions.name: filter_replacement
maintenance_actions.what_it_resets: filter element condition and service indicator
maintenance_actions.evidence: Stop the compressor. Switch off the voltage. Release the snap clips and remove the dust trap and air filter element. Clean the trap. Discard the filter element. Refit the new element and the trap. Reset the service indicator

maintenance_actions.name: pre_filter_installation
maintenance_actions.evidence: A pre-filter (cyclone, panel or rotary band filter) should be used on installations where the surrounding air has a high dust concentration

assumptions.statement: Air filter operates at reference conditions of 20°C, 1 bar absolute pressure, and 0% relative humidity
assumptions.reason: These are the standard reference conditions specified for compressor operation

assumptions.statement: Filter requires replacement when choked rather than cleaning
assumptions.reason: Manual specifies to discard the filter element and refit new element during maintenance
